windows.transcript: and the longer you pure it, the stronger the scent will be. The small mistake that's often overlooked is
windows.embed_text_v2: Melting soy wax flakes in black electric wax melter pot beside silicone heart and bubble moulds, with intercut display of finished pink heart and rose shaped candles, digital thermometer present, white surface.
windows.summary_v2: A montage transitions from a styled display of finished pink heart and rose wax candles to overhead shots of soy wax flakes melting in a black electric wax melter beside silicone moulds.

seconds_v2.desc: Decorative arrangement on a light table near a window: a black plant pot with green leaves centered behind several finished pink wax pieces including a heart-shaped candle, rose-shaped candle, gummy-bear cluster candle, and a clear silicone mould of a heart.
Same display from slightly different angle; pink heart, rose, bear-cluster candle and silicone mould visible around the black potted plant.
Closer top-down view on the same display: pink bear-cluster bar, ridged pink mould with candle inside, pink rose candle, and a pale pink heart candle with carved heart on top.
Continued top view of the pink wax/candle assortment on the white table near window light; ridged pink-wax-filled mould prominent center.

Scene cuts to an overhead view of a wax melter pot: white soy wax flakes piled in a black bowl-shaped melter on a white box-shaped warmer; a digital thermometer probe sits to the left; a white silicone hexagon-bubble mould sits on brown paper.
Same overhead shot of the wax melter with mounded white soy flakes; melter beginning to heat, contents still solid; silicone bubble mould at upper left.
Wax flakes in melter starting to slump slightly as heat builds; bubble silicone mould still upper-left.
Wax flakes have melted further, surface lower and slightly translucent in the centre of the black melter bowl.

Different shot: black melter bowl is now nearly empty with small remnants of milky melted wax pooled in centre, next to a row of pink heart silicone moulds and a plastic spatula handle on white surface.
